fields.title: The Lego Movie
fields.description: An ordinary LEGO minifigure is mistakenly thought to be the extraordinary MasterBuilder who can save the world.

fields.title: The Princess Bride
fields.description: A bedridden boy's grandfather reads him a story about a farmboy-turned-pirate who encounters numerous obstacles trying to reunite with his true love.

fields.title: Willow
fields.description: A reluctant farmer is chosen to undertake a perilous journey to protect a special baby from an evil queen.

fields.title: Inception
fields.description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into a target's mind.

fields.title: The Matrix
fields.description: A computer hacker learns the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

fields.title: Interstellar
fields.description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

fields.title: A Hidden Life
fields.description: The Austrian Franz Jägerstätter, a conscientious objector, refuses to fight for the Nazis in World War II.

fields.title: Parasite
fields.description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

fields.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
fields.description: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure where she alone can save existence by exploring other universes.

fields.title: The Shawshank Redemption
fields.description: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.
